description: Baseline: 131,236 KB total (JS: 48,772, maps: 77,696, assets: 4,768). Checks pass.
Replace brotli JS package with native Node.js zlib.brotliCompressSync — saves ~5,904 KB
Enable minifyWhitespace in esbuild bundle — saves 14,112 KB (JS: -11,784, maps: -2,328)
Externalize prettier from bundle (~4MB input, ~11.7MB output+maps savings)
Externalize ts-morph (+ typescript dep) from bundle — saves 23,140 KB. Already lazy-loaded via dynamic import.
Externalize typescript compiler from bundle — saves 19,176 KB. Available at runtime as project dep.
Disable esbuild source maps — saves 35,752 KB. Stack traces still readable (identifiers not minified).
